hooks.description: 위험할 수 있는 쉘 명령 실행 전 확인

hooks.command: if command -v eslint &>/dev/null && [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE" == *.{js,jsx,ts,tsx} ]]; then eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v ruff &>/dev/null && [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE" == *.py ]]; then ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

if [ -f package.json ] && command -v npx &>/dev/null; then npx lint-staged 2>/dev/null; elif [ -f pyproject.toml ] && command -v pre-commit &>/dev/null; then pre-commit run --staged 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
hooks.description: 커밋 전 lint-staged 또는 pre-commit 실행

hooks.command: echo '✓ Commit completed. Run tests if needed.'
